summary: Completed testing of SUSPENDED state feature for 4/6/Wicket cricket events. All 12 backend tests passed (1 transient 502 on first run, passed on retry). Frontend UI verified via Playwright - SUSPENDED banner appears correctly with event type, team rows disabled with opacity-50 and pointer-events-none.

minor.issue: Transient 502 error on first test run (environment startup), passed on retry

success_rate.backend: 100% - 12/12 tests passed (1 transient 502 on first run, passed on retry)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing match 306aeb5b-4d70-4085-98ca-eb312e9f7ffc (Leicestershire vs Sussex)
context_for_next_testing_agent: SUSPENDED state feature fully tested. Key findings: (1) /api/admin/match/{match_id}/test-suspend?event_type=four|six|wicket triggers suspended=true in odds_engine. (2) /api/match/{match_id}/market-status returns suspended flag and last_event. (3) Frontend polls market-status every 5000ms (ODDS_POLL_MS). (4) SUSPENDED banner (data-testid=suspended-banner) appears above odds section with event type (FOUR (4), SIX (6), WICKET). (5) Team rows get opacity-50 and pointer-events-none during suspension. (6) Odds buttons disabled during suspension. (7) P2P bet placement blocked with 400 'Market is SUSPENDED' error. (8) Suspension auto-clears after 15 seconds. (9) Consecutive events reset the 15s timer.

market_status_returns_suspended.details: GET /api/match/{match_id}/market-status returns suspended=true after test-suspend triggered

p2p_bet_blocked_during_suspension.details: POST /api/p2p/bet returns 400 'Market is SUSPENDED' during suspension

consecutive_events_keep_suspended.details: Triggering another event within 15s resets timer and keeps market suspended

frontend_suspended_banner.details: SUSPENDED banner (data-testid=suspended-banner) appears with red background, warning icons, and event type

frontend_event_type_display.details: Event type shown as 'FOUR (4)', 'SIX (6)', or 'WICKET' in banner

frontend_team_rows_disabled.details: Team rows have opacity-50 and pointer-events-none classes during suspension

frontend_odds_buttons_disabled.details: Odds buttons show '—' and are disabled during suspension

mocked_apis.note: test-suspend endpoint simulates events for testing, but real suspend detection is wired to cricket polling via odds_engine.update_score()
